title: Giới thiệu về trang web 9router đến người dùng
raw_text:
One Router.
60+ AI Providers. Zero Downtime.
Connect every CLI/IDE to all major AI providers through one OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
9Router is a smart gateway between your tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Cline, Copilot…) and 60+ AI providers. Smart 3-tier fallback maximizes your subscriptions and keeps you coding when limits hit. Bonus: built-in RTK & Caveman save 20–65% tokens.
npm install -g 9router
9router
api9 Service Kinds OpenAI-Compatible
Every endpoint is OpenAI-compatible. Point your tool to one URL — run LLM, Embedding, TTS, STT, Image, Video, Web Search and more.
Chat / LLM
OpenAI-compatible chat completions across 60+ providers.
Embeddings
Voyage, Jina, OpenAI, Cohere, Mistral, NVIDIA, Together, Fireworks.
Text-to-Speech
ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Inworld, AWS Polly, Google/Edge TTS, OpenAI.
Speech-to-Text
Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI Whisper, Qwen STT.
Image Generation
Fal, Stability, BFL Flux, Recraft, OpenAI, Gemini, MiniMax.
Vision / Image-to-Text
OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, Groq, xAI, Mistral, HuggingFace.
Video Generation
Runway ML, Topaz.
Web Search
Tavily, Brave, Serper, Exa, Linkup, Perplexity, Google PSE, SearchAPI.
Web Fetch
Tavily, Exa, Firecrawl, Jina Reader.
How 9Router Works
Install once, connect providers, code non-stop with smart 3-tier fallback.
Install & Connect
npm install -g 9router
- Dashboard opens automatically
- OAuth or API key per provider
Smart 3-Tier Routing
⚡ Auto fallback when quota runs out
Code Non-Stop
- Point your CLI to
localhost:20128
- Zero downtime, automatic switching
- Track quota & usage in real time
hub60+ AI Providers
OAuth, API key or browser cookie. Featured 24 below — full list inside the app.
terminalCLI / IDE Integrations
Point any tool to localhost:20128. Per-tool setup guides included.
terminalCLI Tools (10)
Claude Code
Anthropic Claude CLI
OpenAI Codex
OpenAI Codex CLI
OpenClaw
Open Claw assistant
Cursor
AI code editor
Cline
AI coding assistant
Kilo Code
Kilo Code AI
Roo
Roo AI
Continue
Continue AI
Factory Droid
Factory AI
Hermes Agent
Self-improving agent
shieldMITM Bridge — IDE Subscription Intercept
Intercept Antigravity / GitHub Copilot / Kiro IDE traffic — use IDE subscriptions to call any backend through 9Router (mind each tool's policy).
Antigravity
Google Antigravity IDE
GitHub Copilot
VS Code Copilot intercept
Kiro IDE
AWS Kiro IDE intercept
auto_awesomeAdvanced Features
Combos, Translator, RTK, Caveman, Multi-account, Cloud sync, Tunnel, Proxy pools, MITM bridge.
Smart Combos
Chain providers into one virtual provider with sticky round-robin and automatic fallback.
Real-time Quota
Live token tracking, reset countdown, cost estimation per provider.
Format Translator
Convert between OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini formats — any tool with any provider.
Multi-Account
Multiple accounts per provider, round-robin load balancing, automatic failover.
Cloud Sync + Tunnel
Cloudflare edge tunnel — use your router from anywhere, 300+ global locations.
Proxy Pools
Vercel relay, outbound proxy, rotate IPs for region-restricted providers.
MITM Bridge
Intercept Antigravity / Copilot / Kiro IDE traffic — use IDE subscriptions with any backend.
OpenAI-Compatible
One endpoint speaks chat, embeddings, TTS, STT, image, video, search and fetch.
Visual Dashboard
Manage providers, keys, combos and usage from a clean local UI.
And while we're at it, save 20–65% tokens for free
RTK and Caveman Mode ship with 9Router. They quietly compress what goes in and trim what comes out — same answers, fewer tokens.
RTK Token Saver
−20–40%Auto-compress tool_result content (git diff, grep, ls, find, tree…) before it reaches the LLM. Lossless, safe, default ON.
Caveman Mode
−65%Inject a terse-style system prompt — LLM replies stay technical but compact. Five intensity levels.
💡 Combine with FREE-tier providers and you're routing for $0/month with built-in token savings.
rocket_launchGet Started in Two Commands
Install globally, connect providers, code with smart auto-fallback.
Install Globally
One command installs 9Router system-wide.
npm install -g 9router
Connect Providers
Open the dashboard and add OAuth or API keys per tier.
Point Your Tool
Set Cursor / Cline / Claude Code / Codex to the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
http://localhost:20128/v1
http://localhost:20128/v1
Stop Wasting Your AI Subscriptions
Subscription quota expires unused every month
Rate limits cut your coding session mid-flow
Manually switching between providers wastes time

storyboard.title: Chỉ 1 Router, mở khoá 60+ AI & không ngắt kết nối?!

scenes.visual_prompt: Dynamic cinematic close-up of a futuristic network router glowing with animated neon circuits, surrounded by floating icons for AI services (chat, image, voice), deep blue and purple backlight, 4k detail
scenes.text: Bạn tin nổi không? Chỉ với 1 router, kết nối được hơn 60 AI providers, chạy liên tục không gián đoạn!

caption.vi: Bạn tin nổi không? Chỉ với 1 router, kết nối được hơn 60 AI providers, chạy liên tục không gián đoạn!

scenes.visual_prompt: Wide-angle view of dozens of glowing AI logos orbiting around a central router, electric sparks connecting each one, modern cyberpunk atmosphere
scenes.text: Chỉ cần trỏ CLI hoặc IDE về một endpoint duy nhất — mọi AI lớn nhất đều nằm trong tầm tay bạn!

caption.vi: Chỉ cần trỏ CLI hoặc IDE về một endpoint duy nhất — mọi AI lớn nhất đều nằm trong tầm tay bạn!

scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic UI overlay showing multiple API keys and provider logos filling up a dashboard screen in a sleek, high-tech workspace, glowing data charts animate in real time
scenes.text: Dashboard trực quan: quản lý provider, key, combo, quota, token sử dụng và chi phí trong thời gian thực!

caption.vi: Dashboard trực quan: quản lý provider, key, combo, quota, token sử dụng và chi phí trong thời gian thực!

scenes.visual_prompt: Seamless motion of CLI terminal windows auto-switching between OpenAI, Cohere, Anthropic with speed lines, fallback chain illuminated in green, digital matrix background
scenes.text: Smart 3-tier fallback: hết quota là tự động chuyển provider, phiên làm việc không bao giờ ngắt giữa chừng.

caption.vi: Smart 3-tier fallback: hết quota là tự động chuyển provider, phiên làm việc không bao giờ ngắt giữa chừng.

scenes.visual_prompt: Macro shot of code editor, single command 'npm install -g 9router' typed, shimmering effect as installation completes instantly, soft light and sharp focus on code lines
scenes.text: Cài đặt cực dễ – chỉ cần một dòng npm, tích hợp bất kỳ IDE hoặc CLI qua một URL duy nhất.

caption.vi: Cài đặt cực dễ – chỉ cần một dòng npm, tích hợp bất kỳ IDE hoặc CLI qua một URL duy nhất.

scenes.visual_prompt: Fast montage: Multiple windows showing token counters dropping sharply, percentage saved with green overlay (-20%, -65%), icons for RTK & Caveman morphing and glowing, sparkling visual effects
scenes.text: Tích hợp RTK & Caveman giúp tiết kiệm 20 đến 65% token mỗi lần gọi AI – tối ưu cả chất lượng lẫn chi phí!

caption.vi: Tích hợp RTK & Caveman giúp tiết kiệm 20 đến 65% token mỗi lần gọi AI – tối ưu cả chất lượng lẫn chi phí!

scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of IDE screens, text auto-translating and formatting between OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini formats; multi-account icons, proxy pool animation swirling in background
scenes.text: Smart combos, chuyển format, multi-account, cloud sync, proxy pools, interception cho mọi IDE bản quyền — tất cả đều trong 9 Router!

caption.vi: Smart combos, chuyển format, multi-account, cloud sync, proxy pools, interception cho mọi IDE bản quyền — tất cả đều trong 9 Router!

scenes.visual_prompt: Final shot: Camera pans out from router to cityscape at night, luminous digital lines connecting every building, text “Stop wasting your AI. Start routing smarter”, success flare
scenes.text: Đừng lãng phí subscription và token nữa. Dùng 9 Router — kết nối 60+ AI providers, tiết kiệm tối đa, chỉ với 1 router duy nhất!

caption.vi: Đừng lãng phí subscription và token nữa. Dùng 9 Router — kết nối 60+ AI providers, tiết kiệm tối đa, chỉ với 1 router duy nhất!
